{{Quote|You won't get away with this, Jedi!|Grelb to [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan]]|<ref name="The Rising Force" />}}
'''Grelb''' was the errand boy who served [[Jemba]] the Hutt.

==Biography==
In [[44 BBY/Legends|44 BBY]], Grelb was stationed on the [[Monument (freighter)|''Monument'']], where he was employed by [[Jemba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]. He was accompanying [[Offworld Mining Corporation]] workers on a trip to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bandomeer/Legends|Bandomeer]]. After the ''Monument'' was attacked by [[Togorian/Legends|Togorian]] pirates, the ship had to make an emergency landing on an island of an [[Unidentified blue marble planet|unknown planet]] with five moons.<ref name="The Rising Force" />

After the ship had to be evacuated from a flooding, Grelb was ordered to guard the stolen [[dactyl]]. He obeyed the order until he grew suspicious of [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] (also headed to Bandomeer), who struck a different path than the crew. When he ordered the [[Whiphid/Legends|Whiphid]] thugs to kill the Jedi, they made their encounter with the native [[draigon]]s, who were drawn . When Jemba's henchmen were [[Death/Legends|devoured]] by these flying [[Reptile/Legends|reptiles]], Grelb slithered away while the draigons began to attack Qui-Gon Jinn and the rest of the passengers. He feared that his boss would kill him and planned a way to kill the Jedi. Before he could attack Qui-Gon, the Jedi disappeared with the recovered dactyl in the caves. Grelb grew furious and went on to attack Jinn's apprentice; deep inside, he admired Obi-Wan's skill and almost regretted the necessity of killing him. Obi-Wan was able to dodge the stray bolt which ironically killed Jemba, who also trying to make his move to kill the Jedi. Before he could escape, Grelb was attacked and eaten by a draigon.<ref name="The Rising Force" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Rising Force]]'' {{1st}}
